_documentation.description: URD ABI Chemical Library — Molecule catalogue

instructions.how_to_add: Copy any molecule entry, change the 'id' to the next ABI-XXX number, fill in your data, and save.
instructions.how_to_use: Place this file as 'urd-abi-catalogue.json' in the same folder as the HTML file. The website loads it automatically.
instructions.id_format: ABI-XXX where XXX is a zero-padded 3-digit number, e.g. ABI-013, ABI-042
instructions.svgPath: Leave empty ('') — the site generates a placeholder automatically. SVG rendering from SMILES will be added in a future update.
instructions.spectra_files: Place PDF spectra in: spectra/ABI-XXX/ABI-XXX_NMR.pdf, ABI-XXX_UV.pdf, ABI-XXX_MS.pdf. The site generates these paths automatically from the molecule ID. To override, use the optional 'spectraPaths' field (see field_reference).
instructions.stats_banner: The hero banner stats are driven by: 'total_molecules' (auto-counted), 'patents' (set manually here), 'publications' (set manually here).

field_reference.name: Short display name (required)
field_reference.family: Chemical family — must match one of: 'Phenols', 'Sinapic', 'Ferulic', 'Coumaric', 'Caffeic', 'Flavonoid', 'Polyphenols', 'Furans', 'SugarDerivs', 'Extracts', 'Other'
field_reference.mw: Molecular weight as number in g/mol, or string for polymers (required)
field_reference.mp: Melting point as string, e.g. '89–91°C', or null
field_reference.applications: Array of activity tags — choose from: 'uvprotect', 'conservative', 'polymeraddit', 'odors', 'greenchem'
field_reference.svgPath: SVG string for 2D structure, or '' for auto placeholder
field_reference.notes: Free text notes (storage, hazards, batch info…)
field_reference.references: Liste de références. Accepte des DOIs (ex: '10.1039/C8GC00282G') ou des URLs complètes. Les DOIs sont automatiquement transformés en liens https://doi.org/...
field_reference.spectraPaths: (Optional) Custom paths to spectra files. Overrides the auto-generated path. Example: { "nmr": "spectra/ABI-001/ABI-001_NMR.pdf", "uv": "spectra/ABI-001/ABI-001_UV.pdf", "ms": "spectra/ABI-001/ABI-001_MS.pdf" }. Leave absent to use the auto-generated path: spectra/{id}/{id}_NMR.pdf etc.
field_reference.bp: Boiling point as string, e.g. '312°C' or null
field_reference.storage: Storage conditions, e.g. 'Room temperature, protect from light' or null
field_reference.sds: true/false — Security Data Sheet (SDS) available as PDF
field_reference.state: Physical state of the compound, e.g. 'Solid', 'Liquid', 'Oil', 'Amorphous solid', 'Viscous liquid'
field_reference.patents: Number of patents — displayed in the hero banner. Update manually.
field_reference.publications: Number of publications linked to the catalogue — displayed in the hero banner. Update manually.
field_reference.patented: true → affiche le badge 'Patented' sur la carte. false ou absent → badge masqué.
field_reference.tg: Température de transition vitreuse en °C. Ex: "78°C" ou null si non applicable.
field_reference.published: true → affiche le badge 'Published' sur la carte. false ou absent → badge masqué. Si patented ET published sont tous les deux true, les deux badges s'affichent côte à côte.

catalogue_metadata.location: CEBB, 3 rue des Rouges Terres, 51110 Pomacle, France
